title: 低数量、小订单和试单谈判
theme: 从 trial order / below MOQ / stock option 开始
goals: 能在客户数量低于 MOQ 时礼貌解释限制，而不是直接拒绝
能说明小数量会导致 higher unit price，并给出可选方案
能用 trial order、stock option、mixed order 和 repeat order 争取后续订单

review.title: Day 14 复习
items: 昨天练了 finish、matte、glossy、printing、engraving、Pantone、color matching 和 swatch。
今天从产品细节进入订单谈判：客户可能喜欢产品，但第一次只想买很少数量。
遇到低数量不要只说 MOQ is 1000，要解释原因、给替代方案，并为后续 repeat order 留空间。

preview.scenario: 客户说第一次只想买 100 pcs，但你的 MOQ 是 1000 pcs。你需要判断是否有库存、能否混款、是否需要加价，并把客户引导到试单或后续复购。
needToKnow: below MOQ 不是不能谈，而是要说明生产限制和成本影响。
trial order 可以降低客户心理压力，但供应商要保护成本。
stock option、mixed order 和 repeat order 是小订单谈判中最实用的三种转圜方式。

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户第一次小批量测试市场或质量。
vocabulary.example: We can support a trial order for your first purchase.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户订购数量较少，通常低于正常生产要求。
vocabulary.example: For a small quantity, the unit price will be higher.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明客户数量达不到工厂最低生产数量。
vocabulary.example: Your quantity is below MOQ, but we can check a possible solution.

vocabulary.usage: 用于解释小订单分摊成本更高，所以单价会上升。
vocabulary.example: A small quantity will have a higher unit price because of setup cost.

vocabulary.meaning: 库存方案 / 现货选项
vocabulary.usage: 用于推荐客户选择现货颜色、现货规格或库存款式来降低 MOQ。
vocabulary.example: We can offer a stock option if you need a lower quantity.

vocabulary.meaning: 混合订单 / 混款订单
vocabulary.usage: 用于客户把多个颜色、规格或款式合并达到起订要求。
vocabulary.example: A mixed order may help you reach the minimum quantity.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户试单后再次下单，常用于谈长期合作。
vocabulary.example: If the trial order works well, we can discuss the repeat order soon.

vocabulary.meaning: 价格阶梯 / 数量折扣点
vocabulary.usage: 用于说明不同数量对应不同单价。
vocabulary.example: The price break starts from 1,000 pieces.

sentences.label: 礼貌说明低于 MOQ
sentences.natural: This quantity is below our MOQ.
sentences.business: This quantity is below our MOQ, but I can check if we have a flexible solution for your trial order.

sentences.label: 解释小单单价更高
sentences.natural: For a small quantity, the unit price will be higher.
sentences.business: For a small quantity, the unit price will be higher because the setup cost is shared by fewer pieces.

sentences.label: 推荐库存方案
sentences.natural: You can choose our stock option for a lower quantity.
sentences.business: If you can accept our stock option, we may be able to support a lower quantity and faster delivery.

sentences.label: 建议混款达到数量
sentences.natural: A mixed order may help you reach the minimum quantity.
sentences.business: If you can mix colors or sizes in one order, it may help you reach the minimum quantity more easily.

sentences.label: 争取试单后复购
sentences.natural: If the trial order works well, we can discuss the repeat order.
sentences.business: If the trial order works well in your market, we can discuss a better price for your repeat order.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太生硬，客户会觉得你只是在拒绝，没有帮他找方案。
chatAnalysis.better: This quantity is below our MOQ, but I can check if we have a flexible solution.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: This quantity is below our MOQ, but I can check if we have a flexible solution for your trial order, such as a stock option or mixed order.

chatAnalysis.problem: expensive 容易让客户觉得你在随意加价，应该解释成本原因。
chatAnalysis.better: For a small quantity, the unit price will be higher.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: For a small quantity, the unit price will be higher because the setup cost is shared by fewer pieces.

chatAnalysis.problem: 语气像催客户加量，没有给出清晰的价格阶梯逻辑。
chatAnalysis.better: The price break starts from 1,000 pieces.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: The price break starts from 1,000 pieces, so if you can increase the quantity, we can offer a better unit price.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：客户数量低于 MOQ

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we order 100 pieces first?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: This quantity is below our MOQ, but I can check if we have a flexible solution.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We only need a trial order.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. I will check if we can support a trial order for you.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：说明小单价格更高

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Why is the price higher for 200 pieces?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: For a small quantity, the unit price will be higher because the setup cost is shared by fewer pieces.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you give us a better price?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If you can increase the quantity to the price break, we can offer a better unit price.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：推荐库存和混款方案

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We cannot buy 1,000 pieces for the first order.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. If you can accept our stock option, we may support a lower quantity.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we mix colors in one order?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, a mixed order may help you reach the minimum quantity more easily.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：客户要求低数量试单并争取更低价格

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We like the sample, but we want to start with 100 pieces.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you for your feedback. May I know if this is for a trial order?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Yes, we want to test the market first.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. Our normal MOQ is 1,000 pieces, so 100 pieces is below MOQ.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you make an exception for us?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I can check it for you, but for a small quantity, the unit price will be higher.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Why is the unit price higher?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Because the setup cost, logo cost, and packing cost are shared by fewer pieces.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We understand, but the price still needs to be reasonable.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Let me check whether we have a stock option that can support a lower quantity.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What do you mean by stock option?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: It means you choose our available stock color or standard specification instead of a fully customized version.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we still add our logo?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Possibly yes, but we need to check the logo method and minimum logo quantity.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we mix different colors to reach the MOQ?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: A mixed order may help, especially if the colors are available in stock.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We may take 300 pieces first, mixed in three colors.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: That sounds more workable. I will check if 300 pieces mixed order can be accepted.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If the market response is good, we will place a repeat order.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: That would be great. If the trial order works well, we can discuss a better price for your repeat order.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you give me the price for 300 pieces and 1,000 pieces?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. I will send you two price levels so you can compare the price break clearly.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please include the logo cost and packing cost.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will include the product price, logo cost, packing cost, and estimated lead time.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If the 300-piece price is too high, we may wait until we can order more.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. I will try to give you the best workable option for the trial order.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please update us today if possible.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will check with our factory and update you today with the available options.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：这个数量低于我们的 MOQ，但我可以帮您确认是否有灵活方案。
exercises.answer: This quantity is below our MOQ, but I can check if we have a flexible solution for you.
acceptable: this quantity is below our moq but i can check if we have a flexible solution for you
this quantity is below our moq but i can check if we have a flexible solution
your quantity is below our moq but i can check if we have a flexible solution
exercises.hint: 不要直接说 cannot do，要加 flexible solution。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：MOQ 1000, cannot do 100
exercises.answer: This quantity is below our MOQ, but I can check if we have a flexible solution for your trial order.
acceptable: this quantity is below our moq but i can check if we have a flexible solution for your trial order
this quantity is below our moq but i can check if we have a flexible solution
exercises.hint: 保留 MOQ 信息，但语气要帮客户找方案。

exercises.prompt: 填空：For a small quantity, the ____ price will be higher.
客户第一次只要 100 pcs，哪个回复更适合？
options: This quantity is below our MOQ, but I can check if we have a flexible solution for your trial order.
exercises.answer: This quantity is below our MOQ, but I can check if we have a flexible solution for your trial order.
acceptable: this quantity is below our moq but i can check if we have a flexible solution for your trial order
exercises.hint: 既说明 MOQ，又给客户台阶。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：如果您能接受库存方案，我们可能可以支持更低数量。
exercises.answer: If you can accept our stock option, we may be able to support a lower quantity.
acceptable: if you can accept our stock option we may be able to support a lower quantity
if you can accept our stock option we may support a lower quantity

exercises.prompt: 客户说：If the trial order works, we will order more next time. 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: That would be great. If the trial order works well, we can discuss a better price for your repeat order.
acceptable: that would be great if the trial order works well we can discuss a better price for your repeat order
if the trial order works well we can discuss a better price for your repeat order
exercises.hint: 用 repeat order 承接后续复购和更好价格。

homework: 把 trial order、small quantity、below MOQ、higher unit price、stock option、mixed order、repeat order、price break 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍，重点练 below MOQ 和 higher unit price 的解释。
写一段 WhatsApp 回复：客户要 100 pcs 试单，你要说明低于 MOQ、可查库存方案、并给 300 pcs / 1000 pcs 两个价格阶梯。
tomorrow: Day 16 会练生产前最终确认，避免数量、规格、包装、唛头和交期出错。
